data.title: $6.2M stolen from Saga exploit land on Tornado Cash
data.description:
$6. 2 million of the funds stolen during the SagaEVM exploit has been traced to deposits into Tornado Cash, a privacy mixer on Ethereum that helps obscure transaction trails. The tactic is common among hackers trying to launder considerable stolen funds and make recovery almost impossible. The exploit that targeted SagaEVM, described as an L1 to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/saga-exploit-land-on-tornado-cash/

data.title: Senate Bill Proposes CFTC Oversight of Spot Crypto Markets
data.description: Senate Agriculture Committee Chair John Boozman has introduced legislation aimed at granting the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) authority and funding to regulate spot cryptocurrency markets through brokers, dealers, exchanges, and custodians. According to NS3.AI, the bill proposes the establishment of an Office of the Digital Commodity Retail Advocate to handle retail user complaints, including withdrawal delays and platform outages, with the goal of enforcing regulatory feedback loops. Additionally, the bill seeks to clarify definitions related to decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols to determine the extent of regulatory oversight. It authorizes a $150 million appropriation to support initial regulatory efforts prior to the commencement of fee collections.

data.title: Best licensed crypto casinos (Curacao, MGA, Isle of Man) — 2026 guide
data.description:
Crypto Licenses help verify operator identity, responsible gambling, and ensure some form of dispute escalation. Casinos without licenses are prone to mismanagement and money laundering. They also operate in a regulatory grey area, raising concerns of legal prosecution and potential criminal penalties. There are multiple recognised international regulatory authorities for crypto casinos
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/best-licensed-crypto-casinos-curacao-mga/

data.title: Gemini’s NFT platform Nifty Gateway enters immediate shutdown process
data.description:

With the announcement, Nifty Gateway becomes the latest upstart from the NFT era to become defunct […]
